summary: Completed testing of Admin Notification System and Social Pages. Backend APIs all passing (19/19 tests). Frontend admin notification settings page working correctly. Fixed critical babel plugin infinite recursion bug. Minor issue with Friends page API trailing slash.

integration_issues.issue: Friends page shows 'Failed to load friends data' error due to trailing slash in API URL (/api/friends/requests/ should be /api/friends/requests)

action_items: Fix trailing slash in Friends.jsx API calls (line 35: /api/friends/requests/ should be /api/friends/requests)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed babel-metadata-plugin.js infinite recursion bug by adding depth limit and cycle detection in subtreeHasPortals function
AdminNotificationSettings.jsx had circular import with AdminLayout.jsx - removed unused adminAPI import

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Admin notifications working, Friends page has minor API issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin notification system fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/admin/notifications/* all working. Frontend settings page at /admin/notifications working. Friends page has minor trailing slash issue in API URL. Groups and Events pages working correctly.
